title: Caramelized Algerian Mung Bean Sprout Stir-Fry
description: An earthy and silky lazy-sunday dish featuring mung bean sprouts, caramelized for a sweet touch without eggs, suitable for vegans and egg-free diets.

ingredients.name: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: In a shallow baking dish, toss the mung bean sprouts with olive oil and sprinkle them lightly with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes or until the edges start to brown slightly. Do not overcook as this can make the beans too soft.
In a skillet, sauté minced garlic in olive oil until fragrant but not browned.
Once the sprouts are done, add them back into the skillet with lemon juice and stir gently to combine all ingredients.
Remove from heat immediately to prevent further caramelization and ensure the sprouts remain crisp and vibrant.
